Operation 'getMortgageRates' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description lists parameters but lacks clarity on: (1) whether parameters are required or optional, (2) what the RateResponse object contains, (3) how frequently rates are updated, and (4) the temporal nature of the data. The summary is generic and doesn't indicate the filtering capability. Enhanced version specifies parameter optionality, clarifies the response schema, explains data freshness, and helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and how to interpret results.

data.current_description: Returns current mortgage rate information based on state, FICO score, loan-to-value, product type, occupancy, property type, loan term, and loan purpose.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve current mortgage rates by loan parameters
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves current mortgage rates filtered by specified loan parameters including state, FICO score, loan-to-value ratio, product type, occupancy status, property type, loan term, and loan purpose. Returns a RateResponse object containing rate quotes and market data. All parameters are optional; omitted parameters use default market values. Rates are updated periodically and reflect current market conditions at the time of the request.
data.reasoning: The current description lists parameters but lacks clarity on: (1) whether parameters are required or optional, (2) what the RateResponse object contains, (3) how frequently rates are updated, and (4) the temporal nature of the data. The summary is generic and doesn't indicate the filtering capability. Enhanced version specifies parameter optionality, clarifies the response schema, explains data freshness, and helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and how to interpret results.
